title: trisetum paradoxum
intro: Trisetum paradoxum, also known as the paradox oat, is a type of grass native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trisetum paradoxum include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Trisetum paradoxum is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and stems are used in herbal remedies.
